title: Thrust, c*, and Performance Parameters
summary: c* measures combustion performance independent of nozzle. CF measures nozzle contribution. Together they determine delivered Isp.

keyEquations.label: Characteristic Velocity
keyEquations.description: Figure of merit for the combustor

keyEquations.label: Isp Definition
keyEquations.description: The single most important performance number

objectives: Separate combustor performance (c*) from nozzle performance (CF)
Predict how chamber pressure and nozzle design trade
Understand why vacuum Isp is always higher than sea-level Isp
